overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking through a commercial urban street in Los Santos at dawn. The character moves along sidewalks past auto service shops and storefronts, with street lights still illuminated against the pale blue morning sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with auto service shops and billboards

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past the auto service buildings

notable_agents.action: woman in white jacket crossing the sidewalk from right to left

entered.detail: two-story commercial building with red 'Auto Service' signage and illuminated windows
large building with prominent blue illuminated billboard on upper facade
tall pole with traffic signals and overhead street lamp
red brick paved street with white directional arrows and lane markings

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at an urban intersection during dawn, with the character walking along a concrete sidewalk. An auto service building with red signage dominates the left side, while a large commercial building with a blue billboard stands ahead. A pedestrian in a white jacket crosses the path, and the street is lined with parked cars and traffic infrastructure.

scene_state.functional_zone: continuous commercial storefronts with automotive services

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk past various retail storefronts and parked vehicles

entered.detail: white two-door sports car parked at the curb
storefront with 'Discount' signage and metal security grates
building wall with large 'Los Santos Muffler Man' graffiti mural
red newspaper vending machines on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking past a white sports car parked at the curb. The sidewalk passes various storefronts including a discount store and an electrical supply shop. The 'Los Santos Muffler Man' graffiti is visible on a wall, and red newspaper stands line the sidewalk as the character approaches the next intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: street intersection with corner commercial buildings

events.description: crossing the side street and turning the corner onto a new sidewalk

agents.ego_description: crossing the side street intersection and turning the corner to continue along the new block

notable_agents.action: cars driving along the main road in the distance

entered.detail: two-story corner building with green awning and large rooftop billboard structure
multi-story dark office building with many windows in the background

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the intersection, crosses the side street, and turns the corner. A prominent corner building with a green awning and large rooftop billboard comes into view. The scene opens up to show a wider street with moving traffic in the distance and a tall dark office building on the right, while the character continues along the new sidewalk.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a commercial urban street at dawn, transitioning from a dense cluster of auto shops to a wider city intersection. It begins at a concrete intersection where the character walks past an auto service building with red signage and a large blue billboard. As the character continues forward, the view shifts past a parked white sports car and a series of storefronts, passing by red newspaper stands and graffiti on the walls. The scene then opens up as the character crosses a side street and turns a corner, revealing a building with a green awning and a large rooftop billboard. Finally, the perspective expands to show a wider thoroughfare with moving traffic and a tall dark office building looming on the right.
